title: Light Indulgent Syrian Rice Stir-fry
description: An indulgent yet light dish featuring rice paper sheets and a delicious vegetarian sauce that complements the earthy flavors of the vegetables.
instructions: Rinse and soak the rice in water for about 15 minutes.
Drain the soaked rice, then cook it according to package instructions until tender. Set aside.

In a saucepan, combine vegetable broth, chili paste, garlic powder, diced tomatoes, fresh herbs, and 2 cups of water. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for about 15 minutes or until the mixture is thickened.
Fold in cooked rice into the sauce while it's warm, mixing well.
Slice rice paper sheets thinly and lightly fry them in hot oil until crispy but not burned.
Arrange fried rice papers on a plate, pour the warm rice stir-fry over the papers. Serve immediately.
